security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob:; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Perform music and reactive visuals live
bundle.longDescription: A multi-track music synthesizer and real-time visual performance studio powered by Musica.
